creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 178229
Remove libofa support

The MusicDNS service which audio/libofa generates audio fingerprints for has been discontinued. Since the service no longer functions and libofa has long been abandoned, I have marked it DEPRECATED and am trying to remove it from the ports tree. Hence, I am requesting that libofa support in audio/xmms2 be permanently disabled.
